notes: Cold-start metaobjectCreate parity. Proves that when the proxy has no local record of a metaobject definition, the metaobjectCreate handler hydrates the definition from upstream (Pattern 2) instead of returning UNDEFINED_OBJECT_TYPE. The cassette only carries the MetaobjectDefinitionHydrateByType lookup; the create stages locally.

expectedDifferences.reason: The local proxy stages a synthetic metaobject ID while Shopify returns the captured live-store ID.
The local proxy timestamps staged writes at replay time while Shopify returned the captured write timestamp.
